title: gal DecisionResult
description: Runtime decide() result. Adopts the governance charter's 4-value action (adds 'human_required' to the implemented allowed|denied|audit). Invariant the PDP guarantees: allowed=true iff action in {allowed, audit}; allowed=false iff action in {denied, human_required}.

allowed.description: Permit flag. FAIL-CLOSED: on any PDP/transport error the PEP MUST synthesize allowed=false.

action.description: allowed=permit; denied=block; audit=permit-but-record (the report_only probation posture); human_required=block pending human approval (HITL, e.g. the 'never send without approval' bright line).

decision_id.description: Correlation id for the audit trail.

obligations.description: Side-duties the PEP MUST fulfil when permitting (e.g. 'record_audit', 'redact_pii', 'notify'). Additive extension beyond the current charter; empty/absent if none.

cache.description: Optional caching hint for the PEP/local decision cache.
